arts.ttl: Breaking: Florian Wirtz leaves Bayer Leverkusen match with injury, status in question for Bayern Munich
arts.sum: Florian Wirtz is off with injury for Leverkusen, 3 days ahead of the second leg against Bayern Bayern Munich are set to face Bayer Leverkusen in the second leg of the Champions League Round of 16 next week on Tuesday at the BayArena.

arts.ttl: Ten-man Bayern shocked at home by Bochum
arts.sum: Bundesliga leaders Bayern Munich wasted a two-goal lead in front of a home crowd to slump to a 3-2 loss to visitors VfL Bochum in the Bundesliga on Saturday in a disastrous dress rehearsal ahead of next week's Champions League return leg against Bayer...

arts.ttl: 15:30 Kickoffs: Shocking home defeats for Bayern, Leverkusen and Dortmund
arts.sum: Away delight continues in the Bundesliga with Bochum, Bremen and Augsburg picking up three points from visits to the top guns. Points were shared in the other two early Saturday fixtures.

arts.ttl: Bayern Munich vs. Bochum: Lineups are out—Jonas Urbig, Sacha Boey, Thomas Müller, and João Palhinha all start! Harry Kane and Jamal Musiala benched!
arts.sum: Be sure to stay tuned to Bavarian Podcast Works for all of your up to date coverage on Bayern Munich and Germany. Bayern Munich welcome their mates Bochum for a Bundesliga matchup.

arts.ttl: Bayern Munich fans to display special tifo against Bochum for club's 125th anniversary
arts.sum: Bayern Munich fans will show off a vast tifo display on Matchday 25 as they host Bochum at the Allianz Arena as the club celebrates the 125th anniversary of their foundation. Bayern fan group Club Nr. 12 has put together a tifo that will cover the whole stadium prior to kick-off, with a card placed on each seat to get everyone involved.

arts.ttl: Bayern Munich plot sale of Liverpool target to finance record-breaking buy
arts.sum: Bayern Munich are planning a very active transfer window that could impact Liverpool, Manchester City and Real Madrid.

arts.ttl: Liverpool enquire about a potential move for Kingsley Coman
arts.sum: According to Florian Plettenberg, Kingsley Coman (28) is planning to leave Bayern Munich during the summer transfer window. After 8 years with the Bundesliga giants, the France international attacker is planning…

arts.ttl: 'My favourite players': Son Heung-min snubs Harry Kane and names one former Arsenal star in his 'dream team'
Saturday's Bundesliga predictions including Bayern Munich vs. VfL Bochum
arts.sum: Sports Mole provides score predictions and previews for all of today's Bundesliga fixtures, including Bayern Munich vs. VfL Bochum.

arts.ttl: Bayern Munich vs. Bochum: Lineups, team news, injuries, and more!
arts.sum: Bayern Munich put out a masterclass against Bayer Leverkusen in the Champions League, taking a 3-0 advantage into the second leg. Bayern will line up with a heavily rotated squad since they will play the second leg against Bayer Leverkusen straight after.
